Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 7 

FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT 

LABEL: Facility Data Submission Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date the facility submitted weekly or monthly data to CMS. 

SHORT NAME: FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT 

LONG NAME: FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Patient and hospital 

SOURCE: AHCAH facility-submitted data 

VALUES: 23DEC2020 forward 

COMMENT:
